response.overview: China Airlines cancellation fees depend on the fare class and route, ☎️ +1(888)422-4922 ⭐✈️ uk (44)(800)054-8541 with fees often applied for refunds on non-refundable tickets. ☎️ +1(888)422-4922 ⭐✈️ uk (44)(800)054-8541A free 24-hour cancellation window applies to tickets involving the U.S. if booked at least one week before departure. ☎️ +1(888)422-4922 ⭐✈️ uk (44)(800)054-8541 Fees may apply for refunds, ☎️ +1(888)422-4922 ⭐✈️ and "no-show" fees apply if flights are not cancelled before departure.
